titleStmt.title: SII 26.545: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 545. (A.R. No. 515 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Śīvaladēva: Ś. 1518 and (?) 34th year, Durmuki, Puraṭṭāśi 8 = 1596 A.D., September 7 (Tuesday).

summary.p: This inscription records that certain tax-incomes from the village Viśvanātanallūr were given as sarvamānya by the king to provide for the festival on the days when Bharaṇi fell in the month of Chittirai, of the god Viśvanāthar and for the abhishēka of the goddess Ulagammai, of Teṉkāśi in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu, and that royal servants collected them by mistake, and that therefore the priests struck work. On knowing this the king ordered not only the return of the tax-amounts collected, to the temple but also re-granted the village Viśvanāthanallūr for the same festival and abhishēka as sarvamānya. Besides, several other grants were also announced by the king. They are the remission of the kāṉikkai in the central shrine of the god, the cessation of the payment of paṇam being the share money due to Śeṅkoṭṭai from Viśvanānāllur, the remission of the amounts due on account of the temple-accountant, the Mahānavamī-birthdays, and the kāṉam, the house-tax and the tax on Pal of the village, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu cakāttam 1000 5 100 10 8ṉ meṟcollā
niṉṟa śrīvaruṣan Aḻakan varuṣaḷ Ativirāmaṉāṉa civala te
vaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu Aviṭṭa nakṣattiṟattu cātāraṉa
śrī varuṣaḷ Aḻakaṉ varuṣaḷ Ativirarāmaṉ nām teṉṉāri nāṭṭu
teṉkāci Uṭaiyār vicuvaṉātaṉukkuc caṟuvamāṇi
yamākak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi tuṉmuki varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 8 tiyati cuvā
miyār cittiraipparaṇikkum Ulakammai Aviṣeka kaṭṭa
ḷaikkum Āka naṭantuvanta vicuvanāta nallūrile nammu
ṭaiya maṉuṣar ceṉṟu te(o)ṇṭaṅkoṇṭapaṭiyuṉāle
Atu mukāntiramāka cuvāmiyār koyil nampimār Aṭaittu
koṇṭirukkaiyil Atukku nām cittukkaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi
vicuvanāta nallūrile vāṅkiṉa te(o)ṇṭappaṇamum tirumpak
kuṭuttu Anta Ūraiyum cittiraipparaṇikkum Ulakammai Avi
ṣeka kaṭṭaḷaikkum paḻaiyapaṭiye caṟuvamāṉiyamāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom
cuvāmiyār koyiliruntum vaittu varukiṟa pakutiyumaṟakka ma
ttuc caṟuvamāṉiyamāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom cuvāmiyār Uḷḷāla
yattil naṭantuvanta kāṇikkaiyum kaḻittu kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom vicuva
nāta nallūr pāṭṭattiṟ ceṅkoṭṭai Ūrukku kuṭuttuvarukiṟa paku
ti paṇam nūṟṟu toṇṇūṟum veṇṭām Eṉṟu kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom koyil kaṇakkuk
kāṇikkaiyu makānavami piṟantanāl kāṇikkaiyum pāṭṭattil Aḻantu varukiṟa kā
ṇamum viṭṭuppaṇamum paḷvariyum kaḻittuk kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom koyiliruntu vi
ṭṭu vāṟa muṭṭāvāḷum koyil tūcakkāṟarvīṭu Aṉpatukku vīṭṭuppaṇamum veṇ
ṭāmeṉṟu kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom kuṇarāmīcuramuṭaiya nayiṉāṟkoyiṟ kāṇikkai pakutiyum
makānavami piṟantanāḷ kāṇikkaiyum pāṭṭattil kāṇamum viṭṭuppaṇamum kaḻittuk
kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom cuvāmiyār pāṭṭaṅkaḷil pākam Iṟaiyiliyum kuṭāmal kaṭṭaḷai Iṭ
ṭom cāmiyār koyil nampiyāṉmutal kuppai Eṭuppāṉ varaiyum kaṟavaikkāṇa
ttilum pāṭṭaṅkaḷilun teṇṭa toṣaṅkaḷ vāṅkātapaṭiyuṅ kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom In
tappaṭiye nāḷatu varuṣam nāḷatu mātamutalākac caṟuvamāṇiyamākac cokkanātaṉ tiru
vāṇaippaṭiye Accaṉ paṇṭārattiruvāṉaippaṭiye Ācantarāṟkavarai cempilum
cilaiyilum veṭṭiccaṟuvamāṉiyamāka naṭantuvarumpaṭiyum kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭom tiruvā
y moḻintaruḷiṉa paṭikkuc caṟumuṟi tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 26.545 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
